html:
The Revolv3 team continues to make waves in Southern California’s tech scene, earning multiple nominations at the Octane OC High Tech Awards 2025, one of the region’s most prestigious events celebrating innovation and leadership in technology.

This year, Frank Arellano, CEO of Revolv3, has been nominated for Best Technology Company CEO, a category that honors visionary leaders driving growth and innovation in companies with fewer than 100 employees. Arellano’s leadership has been instrumental in Revolv3’s rapid expansion and its pioneering work in intelligent payment optimization.

Joining him in the spotlight is Robert Podlesni, Revolv3’s Chief Product Officer, who is nominated for the Next Wave Award. This award recognizes rising stars who are shaping the future of their industries through bold ideas and impactful execution. Podlesni’s product strategy and commitment to customer-centric innovation have helped position Revolv3 as a standout in the fintech space.

The Octane OC High Tech Awards celebrate the best in Orange County’s tech ecosystem, and Revolv3’s dual nominations underscore the company’s continued momentum and influence in enterprise technology.

For more on Revolv3’s journey and past recognitions, visit their 2024 nomination announcement.
